title: espeletia paltonioides
intro: Espeletia paltonioides, also known as the "Cushion Plant," is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Andean region of South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Espeletia paltonioides include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in ointments and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
